message:
feat(mermaid): add block-beta diagram parser + layout + render (bd-hudcn.1.15.1)

- Add BlockDef struct, BlockColumns/BlockGroupStart/BlockGroupEnd Statement variants
- parse_block_line() + parse_block_line_multi() for block-beta syntax parsing
- split_block_defs() handles multi-block lines (e.g. a["A"] b["B"] c["C"])
- try_parse_block_def() parses id["Label"]:N format with column spans
- Nested block groups via block:id:N ... end syntax
- Fix parse_directive_statement to not catch "end" as SubgraphEnd for block-beta
- IR normalization creates nodes with block_cell/block_wide_N class tags
- block_beta_fill() provides blue-grey (84,110,122) coloring for block nodes
- Update compatibility matrix: block_beta -> Partial
- Update fixture expectations for block_beta_basic/block_beta_stress
- 616 lib tests + 10 fixture tests pass, clippy clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
